---
title: "NCAA wrestling scoring is a disaster"
author:
  - name: Quang, Greg, and Schuckers
    orcid: 0000-0002-0760-5497
    corresponding: true
    email: steve@steve.com
    roles:
      - Investigation
      - Project administration
      - Software
      - Visualization
    affiliations:
      - Loyola
  - name: Quang
    orcid: 0000-0002-7859-8394
    corresponding: false
    roles: []
    affiliations:
      - Curvenote
keywords:
  - Sports!
  - Scoring
abstract: |
  Some absttract
plain-language-summary: |
  NCAA wrestling tournament scoring is a disaster.
key-points:
  - Disaster
  - disaster
date: last-modified
bibliography: references.bib
citation:
  container-title: Statistics and Data Science in Sports
number-sections: true
---

## Introduction

NCAA wrestling scoring is a disaster

## Examples

## Simulaton Results

How often does a wrestler who finished X score less than the wrestler who finished X + 1?

## Proposed new scoring system

## Conclusion

## References {.unnumbered}

:::{#refs}

:::
